integration_plan.target: SAI umbrella plugin for parental cybersecurity and network status monitoring
integration_plan.gate: Separate integration contract + Saul/Mimi compatibility review before any import from splunk-clone/ into core SAI

claude_desktop.invoke: Open monaecode/Sai in Claude Code; cd splunk-clone; set settings agent to splunky or invoke @splunky subagent

slack_pr_protocol: Post PLAN summary to #splunk-clone-project before opening or updating every PR; post VERIFY summary after push with PR link and agent-contract-pr-review outcome.
acceptance_criteria: All deliverables in deliverables[] exist under splunk-clone/ or documented paths with evidence in contract reviews
Splunk-competitive feature matrix covers Splunk Enterprise/Cloud, Elastic Security, Wazuh, Graylog, Microsoft Sentinel, and open-source SIEM patterns with cited sources in splunk-clone/docs/
Ingest → index → search → dashboard → alert pipeline demonstrable locally or via documented mock/staging
No runtime dependency on unpublished SAI application code; integration only via splunk-clone/docs/integration-manifest.md interfaces
ICM run artifacts complete for every executed stage under .ai/runs/<task-id>/ with contract_id and compatibility_layer in metadata.json
scripts/agent-contract-pr-review overall pass (not pending_manual) on every contractor PR after deliverables are defined
Claude agent splunky invocable by name (project .claude/agents/splunky.md + verified runtimes/claude/tools.json after ONBOARDING)
Slack PR protocol evidenced in #splunk-clone-project (or queued agent-report events if channel pending)

deliverables.title: SIEM competitive landscape & Splunk feature parity map
deliverables.description: Expert-level comparison: Splunk (Search, SPL, CIM, ES, ITSI, forwarders, indexes, apps, dashboards, alerts, RBAC, data models) vs Elastic Security, Wazuh, Graylog, Sentinel, QRadar patterns; recommended MVP subset for SAI plugin.

deliverables.title: Prototype architecture & data model
deliverables.description: Components, deployment topology, index/time-series strategy, schema for security and network telemetry, extension points for future SAI parent app.

deliverables.title: Log/telemetry ingestion layer
deliverables.description: Forwarder/agent or API ingest, parsing, enrichment, backpressure; sample sources (syslog, JSON, cloud audit stubs).

deliverables.title: Search & query layer
deliverables.description: Structured search API or SPL-inspired query language; saved searches; performance notes.

deliverables.title: Security & network status dashboards
deliverables.description: Ops dashboards: auth failures, anomaly tiles, network health, asset inventory views; UX lead deliverable.

deliverables.title: Alerting & correlation
deliverables.description: Threshold/ correlation rules, notification hooks, runbook links.

deliverables.title: Future SAI plugin integration manifest
deliverables.description: Stable API/events contract for plugging into SAI umbrella; explicitly no implementation in core repo until approved.

deliverables.title: Claude-native Splunky agent (skills, hooks, MCP plan)
deliverables.description: Subagent splunky.md, project skills, settings.json hooks for PR/Slack discipline; ICM mirror at .ai/agents/splunky/.

deliverables.title: Tests and project CI
deliverables.description: Automated tests for ingest/search/alerts; CI workflow scoped to splunk-clone paths on contractor branch.

proposed_capabilities.name: github
proposed_capabilities.rationale: PRs, issues, Actions on monaecode/Sai contractor branches

proposed_capabilities.name: sai-agent-report
proposed_capabilities.rationale: Fallback queue when Slack token unavailable

proposed_capabilities.name: splunk-siem-expertise
proposed_capabilities.rationale: Domain skill for Splunk/competitor best practices

assigned_contractors.name: Alpha
assigned_contractors.note: Pilot slot; superseded by Splunky intake 20260716 — do not assign new work
